caption: A young man with blond hair, wearing glasses and white over-ear headphones, is seated in an indoor setting. He is wearing a dark blue patterned shirt and a gold chain necklace. He sits in front of a professional black microphone on a stand. To his left, a decorated Christmas tree with blue, green, and red lights is visible. Behind him is a light-colored wall and a framed screen displaying a blue interface with the number "20" clearly visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, looking slightly to his left with a concerned or focused expression. His mouth opens and closes slightly as if he is speaking or reacting. There is very little movement between the frames, with only subtle shifts in his facial expression and head tilt as he continues to look off-camera.
